title: End of course revision
instruction: Answer these revision questions covering everything you have learned.

questions.question: A supermarket receipt shows 'Subtotal: £34.60 | VAT (20%): £6.92 | Total: £41.52'. What is VAT?
options: Value Added Tax — a government tax on goods
questions.answer: Value Added Tax — a government tax on goods

questions.question: Which sentence correctly describes a budget shortfall?
A form asks for your 'NOK'. This stands for Next of Kin. What does NOK mean in everyday language?
options: Your closest family member or contact
questions.answer: Your closest family member or contact

questions.question: A 2kg bag of rice costs £3.60. A 5kg bag costs £8.25. Which is better value per kg?
A family's income rises by 5% from £2,400. What is the new income?
